summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.5 features completed. All 8 requested features verified working: Landing page loads, valuation form has visible green 'Ajustar coordenadas' button (bg: rgb(27,67,50), text: white), report includes 'Inmobiliaria Profesional' in tips, larger text (12pt base) and icons (28pt), coordinates visible in report, 'Radio 2 km' in equipment title, disclaimer without 'bancaria', API health responds.
passed_tests: API GET /api/health - returns healthy ✅
API GET /api/valuations/val_7348428e33a4 - returns valuation with 15 comparables ✅
API GET /api/valuations/nonexistent - returns 404 ✅
API POST /api/valuations/{id}/generate-report - generates HTML report ✅
API GET /api/stats - returns platform statistics ✅
API GET /api/property-types - returns property types list ✅
Report includes 'Inmobiliaria Profesional' instead of 'Asesor' ✅
Report does NOT include 'Clínicas' in amenities ✅
Report has 'Radio 2 km' in equipment section title ✅
Report disclaimer does NOT contain 'bancaria' ✅
Report has 12pt base font size ✅
Report has 28pt icons ✅
Report has 200pt map height ✅
Report shows coordinates (Coordenadas: lat, lng) ✅
Report has 'Reporte de Valuación' with white text styling ✅
UI: Landing page loads with PropValu branding ✅
UI: Valuation form Step 1 loads correctly ✅
UI: 'Ajustar coordenadas' button visible with green background (rgb(27,67,50)) and white text ✅
UI: Report page displays valuation value, thermometer, comparables ✅
UI: Report shows 6 amenities without Clínicas (Escuelas, Hospitales, Supermercados, Mercados, Parques, Vías de Acceso) ✅
UI: Tips section shows 'Inmobiliaria Profesional' not 'Asesor' ✅
UI: Disclaimer states 'estimación orientativa' and CNBV/SHF/INDAABIN methodology ✅
seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation val_7348428e33a4 with 15 comparables
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.5 features verified working. Key test valuation: val_7348428e33a4. Report generator includes: 1) 'Inmobiliaria Profesional' replacing 'Asesor' in tips, 2) No 'Clínicas' in amenities, 3) 'Radio 2 km' in equipment title, 4) Disclaimer without 'bancaria', 5) 12pt base font, 28pt icons, 6) 200pt map height, 7) Coordinates visible, 8) White 'Reporte de Valuación' title. Frontend ValuationForm.jsx has green 'Ajustar coordenadas' button with bg-[#1B4332] class. Web scraping for comparables uses MOCKED/simulated data as fallback - this is expected behavior.

landing_page.details: PropValu branding, 'Comenzar Valuación' button, stats counter showing 65+ valuations

valuation_form.details: Step 1 (Ubicación) with state selector, municipality, neighborhood, map integration, visible green 'Ajustar coordenadas' button

ajustar_coordenadas_button.details: Dark green background (#1B4332), white text - highly visible

report_inmobiliaria_profesional.details: Tips section updated to use 'Inmobiliaria Profesional' for more professional advice

report_no_clinicas.details: Amenities section has 6 items without Clínicas

report_radio_2km_title.title: EQUIPAMIENTO Y SERVICIOS CERCANOS (Radio 2 km)
report_radio_2km_title.details: Equipment section title includes '(Radio 2 km)' suffix

report_no_bancaria.details: Disclaimer states 'estimación orientativa, no un avalúo oficial con validez legal'

report_larger_fonts.details: Report has larger, more legible text and icons

report_taller_map.details: Map container has 200pt height for horizontal format

report_white_title.title: Reporte de Valuación
report_white_title.details: Title has white text on dark green background for contrast

mocked_apis.web_scraping: Comparables from inmuebles24, lamudi, vivanuncios, propiedades.com fall back to simulated data when real scraping fails - expected behavior for demo
